task_completion.description: Verify the agent opened and read the wellness_challenge_brief.txt file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window displaying the contents of /home/ga/Documents/wellness_challenge_brief.txt.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent logged into the wger fitness manager as admin.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The wger web interface is visible in a browser at http://localhost, showing the user logged in (e.g., 'admin' visible in the user menu or dashboard view).

task_completion.description: Verify the three employee accounts were registered as members of the Default gym.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A user management or gym members page in wger showing the accounts 'maria_chen', 'david_okonkwo', and 'sarah_patel'.

task_completion.description: Verify personalized workout routines were created for the employees.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The workout routines page in wger listing at least three newly created routines corresponding to the employees.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'BMI' measurement tracking category was established.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The measurement categories settings/management page in wger showing 'BMI' added to the list of categories.

task_completion.description: Verify the team nutrition plan was created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The nutrition plans page in wger displaying a newly created team nutrition plan.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the web browser to interact with wger.
integrity.visual_evidence: Browser window open to http://localhost with the wger UI visible, rather than terminal curl/API commands being used to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: Verify the agent manually entered data into the wger web forms.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing web forms being filled out for users, routines, measurement categories, or nutrition plans.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually opened the briefing document to retrieve the required information.
integrity.visual_evidence: The file /home/ga/Documents/wellness_challenge_brief.txt is visibly open in a text editor (like gedit or nano) or printed in the terminal via cat/less.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The briefing document specifies creating exactly 3 users: maria_chen, david_okonkwo, and sarah_patel. The required measurement category to be created is 'BMI'. The agent must also create 3 personalized workout routines and 1 team nutrition plan.
